# Briefing --yes writes review candidates through the CLI service.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
exec pinax briefing recipe init --topic 'AI tooling' --vault vault --json
exec pinax briefing run --yes --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"briefing.run"'
stdout '"writes":"true"'
stdout 'pending_review'
exists vault/.pinax/briefing/review-queue.json
exists vault/.pinax/events.jsonl
exists vault/notes/briefing

-- vault/notes/context.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_context
title: Agent workflow
kind: reference
---

# Agent workflow

Markdown notes and local tooling.
